title: lycoctonum ochranthum
intro: Lycoctonum ochranthum, also known as Aconitum vulparia, is a perennial plant species in the Aconitum genus, commonly found in mountainous regions of Asia and Europe. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly aconitine, which has been used to treat various conditions, including pain, fever, and inflammation. The health benefits of Lycoctonum ochranthum include its analgesic and antipyretic properties, making it a potential natural remedy for managing chronic pain and reducing fever. The plant is often used in traditional herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although caution is advised due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
